Details: SMS messaging service integration for church communications
SMS can be sent to individual recipients
Bulk SMS can be sent to groups
Templates can be created and reused
Integrate with BlessedTexts API for SMS sending delivery tracking and balance checking.
Build SMS template system with variable substitution and preview functionality.
Implement bulk SMS with batch processing progress tracking and opt-out handling.
Create credit tracking with low-balance alerts usage reporting and cost analysis.
Wire SMS to payments treasury and notifications for automated messaging.
Build SMS analytics dashboard with delivery rates cost analysis and engagement metrics.
